span.p:
Author can edit freely.
No version is live.

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Published version is immutable.
New edits create a new draft version
while published version stays live.
